name: Versor Studio Corporate Website
idea: Development of a professional company website featuring a blog, a dedicated case studies section to showcase work, and detailed team profiles. The scope includes CMS integration for content management, responsive design for all devices, and a clean, accessible UI.
guideline: Build a responsive, performant website using Next.js and TypeScript, emphasizing a minimalist dark-mode aesthetic, accessible UI, and seamless content management for case studies and blogs.

timeline.deliverable: Site architecture, database schema, and design prototypes.
Functional CMS integration and responsive frontend components.
Populated content, performance optimization, and bug fixes.
